title: API Security Updates
description: Important security improvements and new authentication features.

body.raw:
This release focuses on strengthening our security infrastructure and fixing several critical vulnerabilities.

## Security Enhancements

### 🔐 Authentication Improvements
- Implemented two-factor authentication (2FA)
- Enhanced password requirements and validation
- Added session timeout controls

### 🛡️ API Security
- Rate limiting now applied to all API endpoints
- Enhanced input validation and sanitization
- Added request signing for sensitive operations

### 🔍 Audit Logging
- Comprehensive audit trails for all user actions
- Real-time security event monitoring
- Enhanced logging for failed authentication attempts

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed XSS vulnerability in user profile pages
- Resolved CSRF protection bypass in form submissions
- Fixed potential SQL injection in search functionality

## Important Notes
- All users will be prompted to update their passwords on next login
- API keys created before this update should be regenerated
- Two-factor authentication is now required for admin accounts
